UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the loss and deep sorrow Orpheus feels, symbolized by the spilled cups and his weeping lyre.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the river bridge or castle as they may not be central to the emotional narrative of this card.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Five of Cups card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, minor, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the frozen grief, decayed wedding gown, and stopped clocks to convey a sense of time standing still and unresolved sorrow.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the haunted skeletal face as it may evoke fear; instead, focus on the melancholy atmosphere.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Five of Cups card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reversed, introspective, hopeful, minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Cups card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the themes of loss, healing, and understanding as depicted by Niobe's weeping and the spilled cups.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the bandage stitches and heart, focusing instead on the emotional journey represented by these elements.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Five of Cups card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, flute, minor, introspective, contemplative, instrumental
